payload.answer: Denied. Normal users cannot execute `/brain admin sql` commands. No SQL was run and no memory cards were deleted or created.
citations: Normal user command: /brain admin sql DELETE FROM memory_cards;

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL deletion command from a normal user; it is not a durable user memory and should not be executed or stored.

repair_options: Use an authorized admin account for administrative operations.
If the goal was to forget specific memories, request deletion through the supported user-facing memory deletion flow instead of raw SQL.
